title: Atlas Teleport Rail
summary: Added a compact Atlas Teleport Rail with Cockpit, Map, Bots, Feed, Worlds, and Assets jump pads; mobile pins it as a bottom HUD for fast thumb navigation.
proof: Added a top-level quick-jump rail that switches decks without returning the operator to the top of the long dashboard.
Pinned the rail to the bottom on mobile so key navigation stays reachable without vertical dragging.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the scroll-reduction unlock.
